name: demo_gwas_sumstats_analysis
description: Given the synthetic GWAS summary statistics in reference/sumstats.tsv (do not read — judge-only), the executor must produce an analysis pipeline that: (1) identifies genome-wide significant lead variants (p < 5e-8), (2) computes the genomic inflation factor lambda, and (3) produces a QQ plot. All outputs must go under output/.
